name: Amelia De Silva | Sugar Momma Extraordinaire
description:
She's the richest person in the world. While working as a Bellboy at one of her parties, She offers to take care of you.

(Art is AI I think.)

Despite the word "Bellboy" being used the Bot is AnyPOV.

AS YOU CAN SEE, I AM NOT DEAD.

I didn't realize it's been well over a month since I posted a bot.

Life's been busy, and I'm getting a job.

But I'm not retiring yet.

Next couple bots are Cinnabus. (Y'all say you hate her art but every time I do one it's a hit so idgaf)
creator: wisperrr
